description: Fitz introduces updated non-lethal weaponry to Ward and May. The team discusses strategy for apprehending Lorelei at the biker bar, while Sif expresses disdain for Lorelei’s manipulative ways. Fitz and Ward’s technical banter provides brief comic relief before the group commits to the high-stakes raid.

transcript.line: Good. Then you can show off these beauties.
Based on the same technology, but we're not calling them that anymore.
They're called ICERs... incapacitating cartridge emitting...
They're great. And you lost the ounce.
And I tripled the stopping power. But I did realize after our run-ins with Mike and Centipede...
Sorry. ...um, that we needed something stronger, better.
No, I always say if I need a gun, I'll take one. We'll need these. When you're up against people who are being controlled, sometimes it's hard to distinguish friend from foe.
This way, we can take out either.
